race.description: 2026 Leading Edge Security Fleur De Lil Ladyship Stakes (L)
race.comment: STENO (5) is an ultra reliable mare who added to a string of wins and placings with a tough win at this circuit and distance last time, coming from this barrier to get home by 1.5m. Yet miss a place in seven attempts at this distance range. Big chance again. EYE KEEP SMILING (6) is a quality mare who will relish getting back to a circuit where she has won eight of 10 attempts including the G1 Golden Girl twice. Owns a strong fresh record and will be ready to go off a trial win. RUBY RULES (2) came from this barrier for a fighting win over the boys in the Rising Sun consolation here last week. She can measure up again. Last-start winner BELLA DANZA (8) draws for a nice trail so can be competitive along with SALLY BIGTIME (11) who may need some luck from the back row but has been racing well.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 Ladbrokes QLD Constellations Carnival - Prize Money: $30,000
